description: An extraction that moves code into a helper but alters side-effect or evaluation order, silently changing behavior.
body: Failure mode: pulling a block into a function reorders when side effects run or when arguments are evaluated (e.g. eager evaluation of a previously short-circuited expression), so observable behavior shifts despite a 'pure structural' intent. Detection signals: characterization tests diff after extraction; side effects fire in a different order; lazy/short-circuit behavior lost. Do not assume extraction is automatically behavior-preserving. Safer fallback: preserve evaluation and side-effect order when extracting, pass values rather than re-evaluating expressions, and confirm identical test output before and after.
